title: UNODC Global Youth Campaign 2026: Share Your Story to Prevent Youth Violence and Crime Worldwide
summary: The United Nations Office on Drugs and Crime (UNODC) has launched an inspiring global youth campaign titled “Your Story Can Change the Path”, inviting young people from around the world to use creative expression to address youth violence, crime prevention, healing, belonging, and hope. This international initiative provides a powerful platform for young voices to contribute to global conversations on safer communities, rehabilitation, prevention, inclusion, and positive social change. Young people aged 18 to 29 are encouraged to share their experiences, perspectives, and creative work to help shape more effective and youth-centered approaches to crime prevention. For young creatives, storytellers, artists, photographers, poets, musicians, activists, and advocates who are passionate about social impact, this is a unique opportunity to be featured in a United Nations-led global campaign. About the UNODC Global Youth Campaign The United Nations Office on Drugs and Crime recognizes that youth violence and crime affect communities across every region of the world. However, young people are often discussed in policymaking spaces without being given opportunities to speak for themselves. This campaign aims to change that reality by creating a global platform where youth can openly share: Their lived experiences Their struggles Their ideas Their hopes Their pathways toward prevention and healing The campaign focuses on the understanding that building safe and just societies goes beyond law enforcement. Sustainable crime prevention also requires: Addressing root causes Strengthening protective factors Supporting rehabilitation and reintegration Expanding opportunities for young people Promoting inclusion and belonging By centering youth perspectives, the campaign seeks to improve how societies understand violence, prevention, resilience, and recovery. What Makes This Opportunity Important? This initiative is more than just a creative submission campaign. It is a global advocacy and awareness movement designed to: Amplify youth voices Challenge stereotypes Encourage dialogue Promote understanding Influence prevention approaches Support safer communities worldwide The campaign particularly welcomes contributions from young people who have: Experienced violence Witnessed crime Been impacted by violence Been in conflict with the law Experienced marginalization or exclusion UNODC aims to ensure that prevention strategies are informed by those closest to these realities. Who Can Apply? The opportunity is open to: Young people aged 18 to 29 Applicants from all countries and regions worldwide The campaign especially encourages participation from: Vulnerable youth Youth advocates Artists and storytellers Young people affected by violence or crime Individuals with lived experience related to justice systems Community leaders Social impact creatives What Can Participants Submit? Participants may use various forms of creative expression to tell their stories and perspectives. Eligible submission formats include: Creative Categories Poetry Personal stories Drawings Photography Videos Music Mixed-media creations UNODC emphasizes that if the work communicates a meaningful story or perspective related to youth, violence, prevention, healing, or hope, it belongs in the campaign. Why Young People Should Participate Participating in this campaign offers young people an opportunity to: Share their voice globally Inspire positive social change Promote understanding and empathy Contribute to international advocacy efforts Challenge harmful stereotypes about youth Support youth-centered prevention policies Most importantly, participants become part of a larger movement focused on creating safer and more inclusive societies. Global Recognition Opportunities Selected submissions may be featured in major international platforms, including: 1. A Digital Youth Zine Outstanding contributions may appear in a global digital youth publication showcasing stories and creative works from around the world. 2. UNTOC Youth Art Exhibition in Vienna Selected works may be showcased at a youth art exhibition during UNTOC in Vienna in October 2026. 3. Global UNODC Advocacy Campaign Creative works may also become part of an international advocacy campaign on youth crime prevention and violence reduction. This provides participants with international visibility and the chance to contribute to important global discussions. Themes the Campaign Encourages Participants may explore themes such as: Violence prevention Rehabilitation Reintegration Belonging Identity Hope Community healing Youth empowerment Social justice Inclusion Resilience Safe communities Opportunity creation Overcoming stigma Peacebuilding Why Storytelling Matters in Crime Prevention UNODC highlights that crime prevention is not only about policing or punishment. Real prevention requires: Listening to young people Understanding social realities Addressing inequality Supporting communities Building trust and opportunity Creative storytelling helps humanize experiences and provides deeper understanding of the social factors contributing to violence and crime. Submission Deadline Deadline: 31 July 2026 Applicants are encouraged to prepare thoughtful and authentic submissions before the deadline. How to Participate Interested participants can submit their creative work through the official UNODC submission platform. Applicants should review: Terms and Conditions Participants Brief Submission Guidelines before submitting their work. APPLY HERE Benefits of Participating Participants may gain: International exposure Recognition by the United Nations Advocacy opportunities Exhibition opportunities Networking visibility Portfolio enhancement Contribution to global social impact efforts Why This Opportunity Stands Out Unlike traditional competitions, this campaign focuses on: Authentic lived experiences Social impact Youth empowerment Creative advocacy Community healing Prevention-centered dialogue It creates space for youth voices to directly influence conversations about safety, justice, and inclusion. Final Thoughts The UNODC “Your Story Can Change the Path” campaign is a powerful opportunity for young people to use creativity as a tool for advocacy, healing, and social transformation. Through storytelling, art, music, photography, poetry, and other creative forms, participants can contribute to global efforts aimed at preventing violence, supporting rehabilitation, and building more inclusive societies. Young people with important stories, perspectives, and experiences are encouraged to participate and help shape a future rooted in prevention, hope, and understanding. For more information on this competition visit here Discover more opportunities on OFY on here The post UNODC Global Youth Campaign 2026: Share Your Story to Prevent Youth Violence and Crime Worldwide appeared first on Opportunities for Youth .

title: UNIDO ONE World Sustainability Awards 2026 Applications Open: Global Recognition for Sustainable Innovation and Impact
summary: The United Nations Industrial Development Organization (UNIDO) has officially opened applications for the prestigious ONE World Sustainability Awards 2026, inviting visionary companies, start-ups, and organizations from around the world to showcase transformative solutions that are reshaping industries through sustainability, innovation, and measurable impact. With applications open until June 30, 2026, the awards aim to recognize groundbreaking initiatives that are driving climate action, promoting inclusive economic growth, strengthening sustainable supply chains, and accelerating industrial innovation aligned with the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). The awards provide an exceptional global platform for innovators seeking international recognition, strategic partnerships, investment visibility, and access to influential networks across UN Member States, policymakers, investors, sustainability leaders, and industry experts. What Are the UNIDO ONE World Sustainability Awards? The ONE World Sustainability Awards are a global initiative led by the United Nations Industrial Development Organization (UNIDO) to celebrate organizations and innovators delivering scalable and impactful sustainability solutions across industries. The awards spotlight enterprises that are creating meaningful environmental, social, and economic change while demonstrating strong governance, innovation, and long-term sustainability. Finalists and winners gain visibility on a global stage and become part of a prestigious international sustainability network connected to governments, businesses, development organizations, and innovation ecosystems worldwide. The 2026 awards ceremony will take place in Vienna, Austria, offering finalists a unique opportunity to present their work before an international audience of decision-makers and stakeholders. Inspiring Example: Oceanpick Pvt Ltd One of the standout innovators highlighted by UNIDO is Oceanpick Pvt Ltd from Sri Lanka, founded by Irfan Thassim. Oceanpick is recognized as Sri Lanka’s first commercially viable open-sea fish farm and demonstrates how sustainable innovation can transform food systems and coastal economies. The company’s sea-to-fork aquaculture model focuses on: Sustainable offshore aquaculture Ocean restoration Climate governance Decarbonization Circular value chains Traceability and certified production systems Resilient coastal livelihoods Community-driven environmental restoration Oceanpick represents the kind of innovation the awards seek to celebrate — solutions that combine sustainability, responsibility, scalability, and measurable community impact. Why Apply for the ONE World Sustainability Awards 2026? Organizations selected for the awards gain access to numerous high-value opportunities, including: 1. High Credibility Through UN Recognition The awards are backed by UNIDO, a specialized agency of the United Nations dedicated to sustainable industrial development. Being associated with a UN-recognized platform significantly enhances organizational credibility and international visibility. 2. Global Visibility and Networking Opportunities Participants become part of a global sustainability platform spanning 173 UN Member States. Finalists and winners can connect with: Investors Policymakers Development agencies Industry leaders Sustainability experts International partners 3. Independent and Transparent Evaluation Applications are reviewed by an independent jury composed of globally respected experts in sustainability, economics, development, climate policy, innovation, and social impact. The selection process follows strict standards of: Transparency Impartiality Credibility ESG alignment SDG-focused evaluation 4. International Exposure in Vienna, Austria The awards ceremony in Vienna provides finalists with a prestigious platform to showcase their innovations before a global audience, opening doors for collaboration, funding, and international partnerships. Award Categories The ONE World Sustainability Awards 2026 feature several categories designed to recognize different forms of impactful innovation. Sustainable Supply Chains This category recognizes organizations transforming sourcing systems, reducing emissions, supporting ethical labor practices, and creating sustainable local value chains. Ideal applicants include companies working on: Supply chain sustainability Carbon reduction initiatives Ethical sourcing Circular economy systems Community value creation Innovative Start-Ups Designed for breakthrough technologies and scalable business models, this category celebrates start-ups that are redefining industrial systems and sustainable innovation. This category is suitable for: Climate-tech start-ups Green manufacturing innovators Clean energy companies Sustainable technology ventures Circular economy innovators Women in Industry This category recognizes organizations that prioritize women’s empowerment and inclusion across technical, managerial, entrepreneurial, and industrial sectors. Eligible initiatives may include: Women-led enterprises Organizations promoting women in leadership Technical training programs for women Women-focused industrial innovation projects Key Evaluation Pillars Applications will be assessed based on four major pillars: Sustainability Applicants must demonstrate a long-term commitment to environmental, social, and economic responsibility. Impact Organizations should provide measurable evidence of positive impact on communities, industries, livelihoods, and ecosystems. Innovation The awards seek novel and disruptive approaches that challenge traditional industrial systems and create sustainable alternatives. Scalability Projects should show potential for expansion, replication, and long-term sustainability across regions or industries. Distinguished 2026 Jury Panel Applications will be reviewed by a high-level independent jury consisting of internationally recognized experts and leaders from academia, policy, sustainability, economics, and development sectors. Notable jury members include: Jayati Ghosh Tshilidzi Marwala Kailash Satyarthi Naila Kabeer Ndidi Okonkwo Nwuneli Yvonne Aki-Sawyerr Deliang Chen Their expertise ensures that applications are reviewed through a globally credible and multidisciplinary sustainability lens. Who Should Apply? The awards are ideal for: Start-ups SMEs Large corporations Social enterprises Women-led businesses Sustainability innovators Industrial technology companies Climate-tech ventures Circular economy organizations Supply chain innovators Organizations with market-ready and scalable sustainability solutions are strongly encouraged to apply. Application Deadline Applications for the UNIDO ONE World Sustainability Awards 2026 are open until: June 30, 2026 Interested applicants should review the eligibility requirements and submit their applications before the deadline. Final Thoughts The UNIDO ONE World Sustainability Awards 2026 present a powerful opportunity for organizations and innovators working at the intersection of sustainability, industrial transformation, and global development. Whether through climate innovation, ethical supply chains, women’s empowerment, or scalable industrial technologies, the awards celebrate solutions capable of driving long-term positive change for people, industries, and the planet. For companies seeking global recognition, international partnerships, and meaningful impact, the ONE World Sustainability Awards offer one of the most credible and influential sustainability platforms in the world. Learn more and apply Interested applicants can apply through the UNIDO ONE World Sustainability Awards application portal HERE . Click HERE to learn more about the UNIDO ONE World Sustainability Awards 2026. Explore more global fellowship opportunities on OFY here . The post UNIDO ONE World Sustainability Awards 2026 Applications Open: Global Recognition for Sustainable Innovation and Impact appeared first on Opportunities for Youth .

title: develoPPP Ventures 2026 Funding Programme for Start-ups in Africa | Catalytic Growth Funding for Innovative Businesses in Ghana, Kenya, Rwanda, South Africa, and Tanzania
summary: African start-ups are increasingly becoming powerful drivers of innovation, job creation, economic transformation, and sustainable development across the continent. However, one of the biggest challenges facing early-stage and growth-stage businesses remains access to catalytic financing that can help them scale their impact and expand operations sustainably. To address this challenge, the develoPPP Ventures Funding Programme 2026 is offering an exciting opportunity for innovative start-ups operating in selected African countries to access growth financing and strategic support. The programme is designed to support businesses with scalable and development-oriented business models that contribute to achieving the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). The current call for applications is open from May 15 to June 30, 2026, and targets start-ups operating in Ghana, Kenya, Rwanda, South Africa, and Tanzania. Implemented on behalf of the German Federal Ministry for Economic Cooperation and Development (BMZ), the programme is supported by implementing partners including DEG Impulse gGmbH and Deutsche Gesellschaft für Internationale Zusammenarbeit (GIZ) GmbH. Start-ups with innovative and scalable business models that create measurable development impact are strongly encouraged to apply. What is develoPPP Ventures? develoPPP Ventures is a funding initiative that supports start-ups in developing and emerging markets by providing catalytic funding for growth investments. The programme aims to strengthen entrepreneurial ecosystems and encourage private-sector solutions that address social, environmental, and economic challenges. The programme specifically targets innovative start-ups that: Already demonstrate proof of concept through initial revenues Have strong potential for scalability Contribute positively to sustainable development Create measurable development impact Operate with innovative business solutions Unlike traditional grants, develoPPP Ventures focuses on businesses that combine commercial viability with development relevance. Objectives of the Programme The programme seeks to: Support innovative start-ups in emerging markets Encourage sustainable and inclusive economic growth Promote business models aligned with the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) Increase employment and entrepreneurship opportunities Strengthen local economies through impactful innovation Enable scalable businesses to attract further investment By supporting high-potential start-ups, the programme helps businesses move from early growth stages toward long-term sustainability and expansion. Current Target Countries for the 2026 Call The ongoing develoPPP Ventures application cycle specifically targets start-ups operating in the following African countries: Ghana Kenya Rwanda South Africa Tanzania The programme provides local support teams to guide applicants during the application and selection process. Funding Benefits for Selected Start-ups Selected start-ups under the develoPPP Ventures programme may benefit from: Catalytic co-financed growth investment Financial support for scaling operations Increased business visibility and credibility Access to development-focused investment ecosystems Support from international development partners Opportunity to strengthen sustainable business impact Enhanced potential for attracting additional investors and partners The programme is particularly valuable for start-ups seeking strategic growth support while contributing to sustainable development outcomes. Participation Requirements To qualify for develoPPP Ventures 2026, applicants must meet the following participation requirements: 1. Company Registration Requirement Applicants must: Already be registered in the target country OR Plan to register in the target country before receiving the co-financed investment 2. Innovative Business Model The start-up must pursue an innovative business model and already generate initial revenues. This means applicants should demonstrate: Proof of concept Existing customer traction Market validation Revenue-generating activities 3. Development Relevance and Scalability Applicants must show that their business model: Has strong development relevance Is scalable Contributes to achieving the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) The programme prioritizes businesses capable of creating broad social or economic impact while maintaining commercial sustainability. What Makes a Business Model Eligible? The programme considers several important factors when evaluating start-ups. Development Relevance A business model is considered development-relevant when it: Creates jobs Improves livelihoods Enhances sustainability Solves social or environmental challenges Supports inclusive economic growth Innovation The programme seeks businesses with innovative approaches, products, technologies, or services that address existing market challenges differently and effectively. Scalability Eligible businesses should demonstrate potential for expansion, replication, and long-term growth within or beyond their current markets. Application Period The current application window for develoPPP Ventures 2026 is: May 15 to June 30, 2026 Applications submitted after the deadline may not be considered. How to Apply Eligible start-ups can submit and manage their applications through the official application platforms depending on their country of operation. For Start-ups in Ghana or South Africa Applications are handled through the platform managed by Deutsche Gesellschaft für Internationale Zusammenarbeit (GIZ) GmbH. Application Platform: GIZ Application Platform For Start-ups in Kenya, Rwanda, or Tanzania Applications are managed through the platform supported by DEG Impulse gGmbH. Application Platform: develoPPP Ventures Official Website Selection Process Applications are reviewed through a competitive selection process involving local experts and programme partners. The evaluation process may assess: Business viability Innovation Financial sustainability Development impact Scalability potential Alignment with SDGs Team capacity and leadership Applicants may also need to provide additional documents during later stages of the evaluation process. Why African Start-ups Should Apply Africa’s entrepreneurial ecosystem is rapidly expanding, and programmes like develoPPP Ventures provide critical support for businesses seeking to grow sustainably while addressing local and global development challenges. This programme is particularly beneficial for start-ups that: Need catalytic funding to scale Already have validated business models Want to expand operations in African markets Aim to create social and economic impact Seek international development partnerships Focus on sustainability and SDG-driven innovation Key Advantages of the Programme Some of the major advantages of develoPPP Ventures include: 1. Strategic Growth Financing The programme supports start-ups at a critical growth stage where traditional financing can be difficult to access. 2. International Development Support Selected businesses gain visibility through partnerships with globally recognized development organizations. 3. Strong Focus on Sustainability The initiative prioritizes businesses contributing to long-term sustainable development goals. 4. Access to Local Expertise Applicants receive support from local teams familiar with the regional business environment. Contact Information General Questions About the Programme For general inquiries regarding develoPPP and BMZ funding programmes: Email: beratung@wirtschaft-entwicklung.de Country-Specific Investment Questions Ghana and South Africa Email: develoPPPVentures@giz.de Kenya, Rwanda, and Tanzania Email: develoPPPVentures@degimpulse.de Official Programme Website Official Website: develoPPP Ventures Official Programme Page Final Thoughts The develoPPP Ventures Funding Programme 2026 represents a major opportunity for African start-ups seeking catalytic financing and strategic support to scale impactful businesses. With a strong emphasis on innovation, sustainability, and development impact, the programme provides an important platform for entrepreneurs building solutions that address real-world challenges across Africa. If your start-up already has proof of concept, generates initial revenues, and aims to create measurable development impact, this could be the ideal opportunity to secure growth support and strengthen your expansion strategy. More global Grant opportunities for youth, visit the OFY website: Click here The post develoPPP Ventures 2026 Funding Programme for Start-ups in Africa | Catalytic Growth Funding for Innovative Businesses in Ghana, Kenya, Rwanda, South Africa, and Tanzania appeared first on Opportunities for Youth .

title: Andrew Flusche Law School Scholarship Contest 2026 in the USA | Win a $1,000 Tuition Award for Law School
summary: Pursuing a legal career is a dream for many students who want to make a meaningful impact in society through justice, advocacy, and public service. However, the cost of legal education in the United States can be financially overwhelming for many aspiring lawyers. To support future legal professionals, Andrew Flusche Attorney at Law is offering the Andrew Flusche Law School Scholarship Contest 2026, a scholarship opportunity designed to assist law students with tuition expenses while encouraging them to reflect on their passion for the legal profession. The scholarship contest provides a $1,000 tuition award to one selected winner enrolled in an accredited law school in the United States. Applicants are invited to submit a compelling essay explaining their inspiration for becoming a lawyer, their future career goals, and how they plan to make a difference in their communities through the legal profession. This scholarship not only provides financial support but also gives students an opportunity to express their vision for justice, leadership, and service in society. About the Andrew Flusche Law School Scholarship Contest The scholarship is sponsored by Andrew Flusche, an attorney who pursued law because of his passion for helping people directly through legal representation and advocacy. According to the scholarship announcement, the contest seeks students who are motivated to enter the legal profession for meaningful reasons and who demonstrate a strong commitment to making a positive impact throughout their careers. The scholarship specifically asks applicants to explain: What inspired them to pursue a legal career Their long-term professional goals Why they deserve to receive the scholarship award How they hope to contribute positively to their communities through law Scholarship Award Value One (1) winner will receive: A $1,000 scholarship award Financial support toward law school tuition expenses Recognition as the selected scholarship recipient Although the award amount may not cover the entirety of tuition fees, it can significantly help students with educational expenses, books, legal materials, or other academic costs associated with law school. Eligibility Requirements To qualify for the Andrew Flusche Law School Scholarship Contest 2026, applicants must meet the following requirement: Be enrolled at an accredited law school located in the United States Students planning to attend law school may also apply if they can provide proof of enrollment at the institution. Essay Prompt for Applicants Applicants are required to submit a compelling essay addressing the following topics: What inspired you to pursue a legal career? What goals do you hope to achieve throughout your legal career? Why should you be considered for the scholarship award? The essay must demonstrate originality, clarity, ambition, and a genuine passion for the legal profession. Essay Requirements Applicants must ensure that their essay follows these specifications: Minimum of 250 words Maximum of 350 words Must directly address the scholarship prompt Should be clear, compelling, and professionally written Strong essays are likely to highlight: Personal experiences Leadership qualities Commitment to justice Community service aspirations Long-term professional impact Required Application Documents Applicants must submit the following materials: First and last name Phone number Email address Mailing address Name of the law school attended or planned Proof of enrollment Letter of recommendation Scholarship essay All documents must be combined into one single PDF file in the following order: Proof of enrollment Letter of recommendation Essay Failure to follow the required order or file format may affect the application. Application Deadline The deadline to apply for the Andrew Flusche Law School Scholarship Contest 2026 is: July 30, 2026 Applicants are strongly encouraged to submit their applications early to avoid technical issues or last-minute errors. Winner Announcement Date The selected winner will be contacted through the email address provided in the application on: August 30, 2026 Only one winner will be selected for the scholarship contest. How to Apply Interested candidates should complete the official scholarship application form available on the official website of Andrew Flusche Attorney at Law Scholarship Page . Applicants should carefully review all submission requirements before uploading their PDF file. Tips for Writing a Strong Scholarship Essay To improve your chances of winning the scholarship, consider the following tips: 1. Share Your Personal Story Explain the experiences that inspired your interest in law and legal advocacy. 2. Demonstrate Passion Clearly show why the legal profession matters to you and how committed you are to making a difference. 3. Highlight Career Goals Discuss your future plans, including areas of law you wish to practice and the impact you hope to create. 4. Be Authentic Avoid generic statements. Use real-life examples and personal reflections to make your essay memorable. 5. Proofread Carefully Ensure your essay is free from grammar, spelling, and formatting errors before submission. Why You Should Apply Law school can be financially demanding, and scholarships like this provide meaningful assistance to students pursuing legal education. Beyond the financial benefit, the scholarship also gives students a platform to articulate their values, ambitions, and dedication to justice. This opportunity is particularly valuable for students who: Have a strong passion for advocacy and justice Want to contribute positively to their communities Need additional financial support for legal studies Aspire to become impactful legal professionals Official Scholarship Contact Information For questions regarding the scholarship contest, applicants may contact: Email: reception@andrewflusche.com Phone: 540-318-5824 Official Website: Andrew Flusche Attorney at Law Official Website Final Thoughts The Andrew Flusche Law School Scholarship Contest 2026 offers aspiring lawyers an excellent opportunity to gain financial support while sharing their passion for the legal profession. With a straightforward application process and a meaningful essay prompt, students have the chance to showcase their ambitions, leadership potential, and commitment to serving society through law. If you are currently enrolled in a U.S. law school and have a strong vision for your future legal career, this scholarship could help support your educational journey and professional aspirations. Apply here Learn More For more information about this opportunity, Click here More global Scholarship opportunities for youth, visit the OFY website: Click here The post Andrew Flusche Law School Scholarship Contest 2026 in the USA | Win a $1,000 Tuition Award for Law School appeared first on Opportunities for Youth .
